name: Barbecued Wings & Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut spareribs crosswise into 2-inch pieces and separate.
2. Arrange the ribs and chicken wings together in a roasting pan.
3. In a processor, mix olive oil, vinegar, lemon juice, honey, sesame seeds, cumin, salt, and crushed garlic until blended.
4. Pour the marinade over the chicken and ribs, ensuring they are well coated.
5. Cover and refrigerate overnight, turning occasionally to ensure even coating.
6. Prepare the barbecue for low heat.
7. Grill the chicken and ribs until they are crispy and cooked through, brushing with marinade and turning occasionally, about 45 minutes.
8. Serve immediately.
